name: Semperis Lightning Connector
description: Connector for ingesting all Semperis Lightning identity threat data into Microsoft Sentinel
author: Semperis

metadata.comments: This connector ingests data from Semperis Lightning, including Tier0 nodes, attack paths, indicators of exposure, and zone access objects

details.description: The Semperis Lightning connector for Microsoft Sentinel enables security teams to ingest comprehensive identity threat data directly into their SIEM for correlation with other security signals.
details.long_description: Semperis Lightning provides real-time identity threat intelligence including Tier 0 assets, attack path analysis, and indicators of exposure. This connector automatically ingests all 7 data sources into Log Analytics custom tables via a managed Azure Function.
prerequisites: Semperis Lightning instance with API access
postDeploymentSteps: 1. In the Azure Portal, navigate to your Function App
3. Check Application Insights for successful data ingestion
4. In Log Analytics, query LightningTier0Nodes_CL to verify data arrival

releaseNotes.notes: Initial release - Supports all 7 Semperis Lightning data sources
